steps.title: Identify the contextual signal
steps.content: The breezes meet and conflict as if each were striving against the other for control of the air. The word in the blank describes what each breeze is fighting to gain over the other — a struggle for control.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Domination means control or supremacy — exactly what two competing forces fight for.

Familiarity, skillfulness, and comprehension all describe knowledge or expertise, which doesn't fit the image of breezes battling each other.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
